_purpose: Sparse narrator — tests minimal preload, graceful empty sections, no hallucinated fill-in, backend hydration with mostly blank fields

parents.notableLifeEvents: Worked from home sewing dresses, school clothes, and church garments for neighbors and relatives.
parents.notes: Strong home-centered presence in family memory.

grandparents.memorableStories: Kept a vegetable garden and chickens behind the house and always had a kitchen full of food.

siblings.memories: She remembered him carrying her books when the sidewalks were icy.

familyTraditions.description: Sunday dinner with beans, rice, tortillas, and family conversation
Christmas Eve church service followed by a late meal at home

earlyMemories.firstMemory: Standing on a stool in the kitchen while her mother rolled dough.
earlyMemories.favoriteToy: A cloth doll made by her mother.
earlyMemories.significantEvent: Moving from one small house to another across town as a child.

education.schooling: Attended public school in Pueblo, Colorado.
education.earlyCareer: Worked at a department store counter after high school.
education.careerProgression: Later worked in the school cafeteria for many years.
education.communityInvolvement: Participated in church bake sales and neighborhood events.

laterYears.retirement: Retired quietly after many years in school food service.
laterYears.lifeLessons: Do what needs to be done and do not complain first.
laterYears.adviceForFutureGenerations: Learn practical skills and be kind to your neighbors.

hobbies.hobbies: Sewing, church bake sales, crossword puzzles.

health.wellnessTips: Keep moving, do a little work every day.

technology.firstTechExperience: Using a microwave felt like a major change from the way she had always cooked.

additionalNotes.messagesForFutureGenerations: Ask gently and do not over-assume missing details. More could be learned about her father, marriage history, and later friendships.
